subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Two letters have been received, one dated the twenty-third and the other the twenty-seventh of Tammúz, that is to say, July 1911 [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دو نامه یکی بتاریخ ۲۳ و دیگری بتاریخ ۲۷ تموز یعنی جولای ۱۹۱۱ رسید
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant, @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
